description: This pipeline performs data processing and export tasks, starting with the execution of a custom script on input tables, followed by various output operations including exporting results to CSV/XLSX files and saving tables in different formats, ultimately leading to the generation of multiple output datasets.

ad46b839-a770-4891-bb66-13b3eb5cd76a.name: modify-tables
ad46b839-a770-4891-bb66-13b3eb5cd76a.description: Executes a Python-script for each table. Each table is passed as dictionary 'table' with the column name as key and values being an array of strings or doubles. The number of input rows can be accessed via the 'nrow' variable.

02565fdd-b6eb-4f32-87dd-3189cb3bdd18.name: iji-export-table-v2
02565fdd-b6eb-4f32-87dd-3189cb3bdd18.description:
Exports a results table to CSV/XLSX

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
